## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Homebase and GrowthX Labs to discuss progress on TLDR content generation and other content initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress made on TLDR pipeline, with improved instructions and content recognition](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [New TLDR structure agreed upon, including listicle summaries and key features](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Glossary topics exhausted; Homebase team to provide guidance on next batch](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [New "start your business" content project in the works, focusing on operational questions](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Topics

### TLDR Pipeline Improvements

  - [Pipeline now reading content correctly and not inventing information](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [New instructions condensed from 2000 to 600 words, improving clarity and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Structure includes headline, intro paragraph, content sections, and no CTA](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Homebase team to provide feedback on a new batch of TLDRs for further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### TLDR Content Structure

  - [Aim for 150-200 words in TLDRs](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Include listicle summaries when present in the main article](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Avoid mentioning direct competitors (e.g., Clockify) in TLDRs](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Focus on providing valuable takeaways for readers and optimizing for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Glossary and Content Refresh

  - [Previous batch focused on hiring terms; new topics needed](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Homebase team to identify gaps and provide direction for next batch](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Ongoing content refreshes may impact TLDR generation for some articles](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### New Content Project: "Start Your Business"

  - [Similar approach to glossary, but focusing on longer-tail query questions](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Topics include payroll, business operations, and other startup-related subjects](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Plan to publish 50-60 pieces simultaneously to test LLM and SEO signals](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up keyword tracking in Scrunch for data triangulation with Profound](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to create a brief for the "Start Your Business" content project](https://fathom.video/share/bcxgY_dnf4NVd3cy-S24Hdg221x493zy?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
